title: The Seraphim Hunt Everyone
description: On pages 14–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #13 as The Seraphim turn against everyone, a traitor among Vegapunk’s satellites emerges, and Egghead becomes the center of a coming world-shaking incident.

dialogue.text: They won't settle for an arm this time...
